title: Book tutorial rollout
description:
Closed **2026-05-05** on superrepo [`f57377a`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/f57377a) (v0.2 delivery tip).

Early v0.2 language book chapters, corelib naming on the public site, file-scoped module semantics in book/reference material, and trudoc/bootstrap wiring ahead of the May platform-spec cutover.

Workstreams: `docs-site`. **3** catalog tasks anchor this deliverable (`milestoneId: v02-book-tutorial-wave`).

- [`94240a3`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/94240a3) (`beskid`) — site: add language book and align module docs with file-scoped semantics
